metadata.notes: The canonical reward-panel-open golden is now a live zh-TW ROX screenshot. Claimable and confirm-modal scenes remain curated stand-ins because the available accounts did not expose approved live claimable or confirmation-modal states during this round.

goldens.proves: Shows the real daily-sign-in reward panel already open in live zh-TW ROX and is the canonical panel-open golden for anchor verification.
goldens.failure_case: Use when the flow fails to detect the opened reward panel or lands on the wrong reward surface before the claim-state checks start.
limitations: does not prove that the claim button is currently tappable

goldens.proves: Shows the expected claimable reward-panel layout with an enabled claim button for the pre-tap affordance check.
goldens.failure_case: Use when the flow reaches the reward panel but cannot verify an enabled claim button before tapping.
limitations: no approved live zh-TW claimable panel was available on the reachable accounts during this round
does not document the post-tap confirmation modal

goldens.proves: Shows the expected confirmation modal layout that should appear after the claim tap and anchors the confirm-state crop.
goldens.failure_case: Use when the flow taps claim but cannot verify the reward confirmation modal.
limitations: no approved live zh-TW confirmation modal was available on the reachable accounts during this round
tracks one curated modal layout only

supporting_captures.proves: Keeps a descriptive live-capture filename for the canonical panel-open screenshot so downstream tooling and manual review can refer to the raw evidence directly.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when inspecting why the reward panel did not open or why the wrong reward page was captured.

supporting_captures.proves: Shows the live zh-TW ROX entry context immediately after tapping the Fu Li menu and before the daily sign-in reward panel opens.
supporting_captures.failure_case: Use when navigation reaches Fu Li but never advances to the reward-panel-open anchor.
